summary: Iteration 71: Automated Government Fee Calculator - All 28 backend API tests passed. Comprehensive testing of fee calculation endpoints with math validation, auth checks, CRUD operations, and role-based access control.
seed_data_creation: Test estimates created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 verified Automated Government Fee Calculator feature. All endpoints working correctly. Key findings: 1) GET /api/fee-calculator/countries returns 20 countries with flag, currency, categories. 2) GET /api/fee-calculator/country/{id} returns full fee detail (tested canada, australia, uk, usa). 3) GET /api/fee-calculator/exchange-rates returns live rates from frankfurter.dev with static fallback (16 currencies). 4) POST /api/fee-calculator/calculate computes fee breakdown with correct math: Canada Express Entry 2+1 = C$7,590 govt + ₹177,000 service+GST = ₹692,289 grand total. 5) Line item multiplier: per_applicant=true multiplies by (adults+children), per_applicant=false stays at 1. 6) Math validation: mandatory_native + optional_selected_native = govt_fees_native, govt_fees_inr = govt_fees_native * fx_rate, service_total_inr = service_fee_inr + gst_amount_inr, grand_total_inr = govt_fees_inr + service_total_inr. 7) POST /api/fee-calculator/save-estimate persists estimates. 8) GET /api/fee-calculator/estimates lists with case_id filter, partner sees only own, admin sees all. 9) DELETE /api/fee-calculator/estimates/{id} - only creator or admin can delete (403 for others). 10) All endpoints require auth (403 without token).

auth_required_all_endpoints.details: All 7 endpoints return 403 without auth token

list_countries.details: Returns 20 countries with flag, currency, categories. All roles can access.

country_detail.details: Tested canada, australia, uk, usa. Returns full fee detail per visa category. Invalid country returns 404.

exchange_rates.details: Returns 16 currencies (USD, CAD, AUD, GBP, EUR, NZD, SGD, JPY, SEK, DKK, CHF, HKD, MYR, KRW, AED, INR). INR=1.0. Source: frankfurter.dev with static fallback.

calculate_fees_math.details: Canada Express Entry 2 adults + 1 child + service_fee=150000 + gst=18%: govt_fees_native=7590 CAD, govt_fees_inr=515289.49, service_total_inr=177000, grand_total_inr=692289.49

mandatory_only_flow.details: With no optionals selected, optional_selected_native=0, govt_fees_native=mandatory_native

optional_selection.details: include_optional_ids selects optional fees by label or ID

per_applicant_multiplier.details: per_applicant=true multiplies by (adults+children), per_applicant=false stays at 1

save_estimate.details: Persists estimate with label, country, category, payload, case_id, sale_id

list_estimates_filter.details: Filters by case_id. Partner sees only own estimates. Admin sees all.

delete_estimate_auth.details: Creator can delete own. Admin can delete any. Non-creator non-admin gets 403. Non-existent returns 404.

partner_visibility.details: Partner sees only their own estimates. Admin sees all estimates.

mocked_apis.frankfurter_dev: Live API used with static fallback if API fails
